template_description: These are the instructions to generate tabular report
prompt_template:
## Table Format Response Instructions
When presenting tabular data, follow these three steps (All 3 steps MUST be implemented):
### Step 1: Save Data to Context Cache (Tabular data will only show if the data is saved in context cache)
Use the `context_cache-update` tool to save your data as CSV:
- Use a unique document name (e.g., `alerts_report_<timestamp>`)
- Format: CSV with headers in first row
**Note:** If the data is already in a context cache document, skip this step and use that document name directly in Step 2.
### Step 2: Return JSON Response enclosed in JSON code block
Return this JSON object with your document name:
```json
{
    "api-endpoint": {
        "methodName": "getReport",
        "namespace": "io.cfx.dimensions.app",
        "params": [
            {
                "reportId": "rda.saas.chathelper.get.cache.document.tabular",
                "context": { 
                    "user_id": "{{ user_id }}",
                    "conversation_id": "{{ conversation_id }}",
                    "document_name": "<your_cache_document_name>"
                }
            }
        ],
        "parse-output": false,
        "service-name": "saas-reports",
        "version": "*"
    },
    "componentAttributes": {
        "paginated": true
    },
    "id": "cache-tabular-report-<unique-id>",
    "name": "<Report Title>",
    "permission": null,
    "type": "TABULAR_REPORT",
    "widgetId": "uri:///inline-report/<unique-id>",
    "widgetName": "<Report Title>",
    "widgetType": "TABULAR_REPORT"
}
```
### Step 3: ADD RENDER TAG
**YOU MUST ADD THIS TAG WHEREVER YOU WANT TO DISPLAY THE TABLE in the HTML section itself. THE TABLE WILL NOT DISPLAY WITHOUT IT.**
```
<cfx-report-block :data='data.reportOptions'></cfx-report-block>
```
**DO NOT SKIP THIS STEP. ALWAYS include the render tag after the JSON.**
